## Scope

- Product issue and intended user outcome:
- Product-owned paths:
- Foundation paths changed, with reuse reason:

## Verification

- [ ] Frozen install, lint, typecheck, tests and build pass
- [ ] Package, release and security boundaries pass
- [ ] Relevant pages and responsive states were reviewed
- [ ] Database changes use a repository migration and disposable verification
- [ ] No secret, customer data, provider payload or private token is included
- [ ] Live provider, deployment and production operations are separately approved
